channel.title: FEDIVERSE on LRG
channel.description: Recent content in FEDIVERSE on LRG

item.title: Tweet - 1597160055056437249
item.description:
Just here to remind folks not to leave Twitter… . . . . . . … Only to join Post It’s the same VC funded, silicon valley bullshit as here.

Go #FEDIVERSE

❤️ 1 | 🔃 0

item.title: Tweet - 1594760999743143939
item.description:
My personal #TwitterMigration has taken another step. Got my archive, which I’ll (eventually) put up somewhere else for funzies. I’ll lurk here for a while, probably post the odd comment or shitpost, but my witty repartee is now entirely reserved for the #Fediverse. Probably. 👋

❤️ 1 | 🔃 0
